layout.offlineMode: You are offline. Saved charts and cached Panchang still work.

home.morningTithiNote: Before sunrise, many families reflect on the Panchang tithi:
home.locationGateBody: Panchang and sunrise times depend on latitude and longitude. Choose your place so readings match where you are.
home.pincodeGateBody: Sunrise, sunset, and Panchang are aligned to India when you save a 6-digit PIN with your place. Open Kundli, enter your PIN, choose State → District → Village, then Generate once so your place is saved here too.

weekday.0: Sunday is associated with Surya (the Sun). A calm pace and gratitude suit the day.
weekday.1: Monday is dear to Shiva in many traditions — quiet devotion and kindness go well today.
weekday.2: Tuesday is linked with strength and courage; steady effort and patience are kind allies.
weekday.3: Wednesday welcomes Ganesha in many homes — beginnings go smoother with a clear mind.
weekday.4: Thursday honours Guru (Jupiter); learning, teaching, and generosity uplift the heart.
weekday.5: Friday is gentle Lakshmi’s day for many — beauty, harmony, and care for others shine.
weekday.6: Saturday reminds us of Shani’s slow wisdom — rest, service, and simplicity bring peace.

kundli.subtitle: Enter your name, birth date and time, then a valid 6-digit Indian PIN. Choose State → District → Village so coordinates match your area.
kundli.name: Name
kundli.birthDateCascadeHint: Choose year, then month, then day. Type to filter the list.
kundli.birthTimeIst: Wall clock at birthplace (IST — India Standard Time)
kundli.pincodeRequired: Enter a valid 6-digit Indian PIN code and pick your birth place from the list below.
kundli.pincodeHint: Sunrise, Panchang, and saved location all use your PIN with the village you select. Enter six digits first; the lists will narrow.
kundli.mapPickerPrivacy: Google receives map interactions when this picker is open. Use only if you are comfortable sharing approximate location with Google.
kundli.mapPickerNoKey: Add VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to your environment to enable the map.
kundli.mapPickerOsmPrivacy: Map tiles from OpenStreetMap; address lookup uses OSM Nominatim (no Google key required).
kundli.patrikaNote: Print-style layout. Numbers in parentheses are navāṁśa pada (1–9) within each rāśi, as on Karnataka Baggona patrikās. Lahiri ayanāṃśa and mean Rāhu/Ketu are the defaults. Vimśottari balance uses savana 360-day y/m/d. Ghaṭī–vighaṭī since Hindu sunrise at birth place.
kundli.dashaLifetimeHint: Bar width is proportional to each mahadasha length; colours follow the dasha lord.
kundli.dashaAntarSeries: Antar dasha sequence in this mahadasha (Ketu→Venus→Sun→… cycle)
kundli.detailsConsentHint: Online narrative is not set up: allow it in Settings and configure a narrative API URL in your build (see README).
kundli.detailsNarrativeNeedConsent: Turn on “Allow online narrative” in Settings to enable this button.
kundli.detailsNarrativeNeedUrl: This app build has no narrative server URL. Add one for developers (see README) — the feature is optional.
kundli.detailsMissingUrl: Narrative URL is not configured for this build. See README.
kundli.syllableHintBody: Common suggestions from popular traditions — not a rule. Many families follow different systems.

predictions.emptyBody: Generate a chart to see readings tuned to your birth data (charts save automatically).

positive.title: High momentum day
positive.summary: {{name}}, your {{moonRashi}} rhythms align kindly with {{planet}} — lean into clarity rather than noise.
positive.career: This is a strong window for decisive moves and crisp presentations. Finish one priority chain before opening another so energy does not scatter. A short written plan before meetings keeps everyone aligned.
positive.finance: Steady gains are possible when you keep receipts and numbers in one place. Review subscriptions and small recurring charges before lunch. If an offer feels rushed, sleep on it once before saying yes.
positive.health: Light walking, water, and regular meals stabilise your rhythm today. Avoid stacking caffeine on top of poor sleep. Stretch shoulders and neck if you work at a screen for long stretches.
positive.relationships: Conversations warm up when you name feelings calmly and invite the other person to do the same. Assume goodwill first, then ask gentle questions. Small acts of appreciation land better than grand promises.

neutral.title: Balanced day
neutral.summary: {{name}}, keep a measured pace while {{planet}} colours your {{moonRashi}} mood — steady beats flashy.
neutral.career: Finish pending tasks before starting brand-new threads; tidy inboxes and tickets first. If a deadline shifts, communicate early so trust stays intact. Batch similar chores to protect deep-focus blocks.
neutral.finance: Avoid impulsive purchases and track small expenses for a week to spot leaks. Move savings automatically if you can. A calm spreadsheet review beats a dramatic portfolio shuffle today.
neutral.health: Maintain routine sleep and meal timing even if the day feels ordinary. Short breaks every ninety minutes help focus. Choose a lighter dinner if lunch was heavy.
neutral.relationships: Listen patiently before reacting; repeat back what you heard to reduce misunderstandings. Give space where someone seems overwhelmed. Humour helps only when it is kind, not sharp.

caution.title: Mindful day
caution.summary: {{name}}, {{planet}} asks for gentle discipline around {{moonRashi}} choices — small pauses prevent big regrets.
caution.career: Double-check details, attachments, and names before you sign or send. Avoid rushed commitments that rely on verbal assurances alone. If tempers rise, reschedule the hard topic rather than forcing closure.
caution.finance: Delay major spending and review budgets calmly with fresh eyes. Watch for hidden fees in contracts. If cash flow feels tight, list essentials before optional comforts.
caution.health: Take breaks and reduce stress-heavy activities where you can. Notice jaw and shoulder tension and soften them. Prefer steady pacing over heroic all-nighters.
caution.relationships: Choose calm words and avoid assumptions about motives. Ask one honest question instead of stacking accusations. Repair matters more than winning the point.

predictions.timingFromTransits: Around age {{age}} years, this layered period invites steadier pacing; honour rest as much as effort.
predictions.dashaUnknown: Dasha boundaries could not be resolved for this age.
predictions.timingGeneric: Gentle hint: align big promises with small, repeatable actions.
predictions.weekTimingHint: This week mixes several lunar tones; mid-week often feels different from the edges — plan buffers.
predictions.monthTimingHint: Solar month {{month}}: pace shifts between cosy and busy themes; favour maintenance before expansion.
predictions.loadErrorHint: If this keeps happening, try another tab (Daily / Weekly / Monthly), switch language once in Settings, or clear this site’s stored data — your chart stays in Kundli after you generate again.
predictions.apiHint: Optional: set VITE_PREDICTION_API_URL so a backend can return richer text in your language (see README). The sections above still blend sidereal transits, Vimshottari, and your Moon sign offline.

doshaNote.kaalsarpFull: Full Kālasarpa pattern — Kaal Sarp puja at Trimbakeshwar or Rahu–Ketu pooja at Kalahasti may be discussed with a pandit.
doshaNote.kaalsarpPartial: Partial serpent-axis clustering — gentle Rahu–Ketu śānti is often suggested.
doshaNote.sarpa: Sarpa-dosha hint (Rahu/Ketu in 6–8) — Rahu–Ketu remedies may help.
doshaNote.pitru: Pitṛ themes appear — Tripindi or ancestral gratitude may be considered.
doshaNote.guruChandal: Guru Chaṇḍāla hint — Guru/Vishnu worship supports balance.

integrated.positive: {{name}}, {{period}} the sky leans supportive: weekday tone from {{planet}} meets a transit Moon in {{transitMoon}} while your birth Moon in {{moonRashi}} still prefers familiar comfort. Vimshottari places you in {{maha}} mahadasha with {{bhukti}} antardasha — let that larger chapter set the volume, and use the day for one meaningful win plus one gentle repair. Hope is practical here: small visible steps matter more than dramatic vows.
integrated.neutral: {{name}}, {{period}} carries a mixed signature: {{planet}} sets the weekday colour, the Moon travels through {{transitMoon}}, and your {{moonRashi}} chart asks for steady pacing rather than heroics. Mahadasha {{maha}} with {{bhukti}} antardasha suggests refinement — tidy loose ends, clarify one conversation, and protect sleep. Neutrality is not emptiness; it is room to choose with both head and heart.
integrated.caution: {{name}}, {{period}} asks for tenderness: {{planet}} sharpens edges, the Moon in {{transitMoon}} can stir old stories, and {{moonRashi}} sensitivity needs protection. Under {{maha}} / {{bhukti}} Vimshottari, avoid proving points late at night; postpone irreversible choices if you feel spun. This is a season for boundaries, hydration, and honest pacing — courage includes saying "not yet."

knowledge.kendraNote: Kendra houses (1, 4, 7, 10) give strength and visibility.
knowledge.dusthanaNote: Dusthana houses (6, 8, 12) bring tests — also deep growth when handled wisely.
knowledge.mitraNote: Natural friends (mitra) support each other’s themes; enemies (śatru) pull apart.

dashas.explorerEmpty: Adjust the age slider to explore dasha chapters.
dashas.bhuktiLayer: The running {{bhukti}} antardasha softens or sharpens how the larger dasha story lands week to week — treat feelings as information, not commands.

mahaTheme.Ketu: A Ketu chapter asks for clarity through simplicity: finetune one skill, shed clutter, and let intuition breathe without superstition.
mahaTheme.Venus: Venus opens harmony, aesthetics, and connection — mend bridges and enjoy music, food, and sincere affection.
mahaTheme.Sun: The Sun period highlights visibility, vitality, and integrity — stand for fairness, yet soften pride into service.
mahaTheme.Moon: Moon brings tides of feeling and home matters — nurture routines, sleep, and gentle belonging instead of chasing every alarm.
mahaTheme.Mars: Mars energises courage and boundaries — pick battles wisely and channel heat through sport, craft, or constructive debate.
mahaTheme.Rahu: Rahu stirs hunger for new horizons — explore learning and networks, yet double-check facts and avoid glittering shortcuts.
mahaTheme.Jupiter: Jupiter leans toward growth, ethics, and teachers — learning, mentoring, and generous choices pay emotional dividends now.
mahaTheme.Saturn: Saturn rewards consistency and honest repair — slow is not stuck; foundations you tend now quietly support later chapters.
mahaTheme.Mercury: Mercury favours communication, study, and nimble problem-solving — write things down, laugh at misunderstandings, and stay curious.

settings.notifyPanchangHelp: A soft morning reminder around 7:00, using your saved latitude and longitude.
settings.notifyRahuHelp: A short heads-up before Rahu Kaal for your saved place.
settings.notificationsHint: Reminders use the place saved from Kundli (state / district / village). You can change it anytime there.
settings.permissionDenied: Blocked in browser — open site settings to allow notifications.
settings.about: Offline-first Vedic astrology toolkit. Your birth data stays on this device unless you choose otherwise.
settings.narrativeHelp: When enabled, “Details about me” can send a short chart summary to your configured API (see README). Never upload scans of documents.
settings.ayanamsaDrik: Drik Gaṇita (True Chitrā — Spica at 180° sidereal)
settings.ayanamsaHint: Applies to kundali, Home Panchang on this device, Maandi, and prediction transits. Regenerate the chart after changing.
settings.nodeTypeHint: Handwritten Karnataka patrikās usually use the mean node. True node oscillates slightly and shifts Rāhu/Ketu amsha.

rahuKaal.warning: Many people avoid starting brand-new ventures during Rahu Kaal; use this as a gentle pause, not fear.

insights.title: Chart insights
insights.subtitle: Classical-style rules (whole-sign houses). Default sidereal anchor: Drik Gaṇita (True Chitrā). For study and reflection — not a substitute for a qualified astrologer.
insights.subtitleReader: A gentle reading from your chart—meant to comfort and orient, not to label you.
insights.disclaimerShort: Sensitive choices deserve people you trust—family, counsellors, or a skilled jyotiṣī. This screen is an educational echo of classical themes.
insights.segmentYogasEmpty: No classical yoga from our small checklist lit up today—that does not dim your sky. Many strengths sit outside checklist names.
insights.segmentYogasIntro: These {{count}} combinations are named with care—each is one colour on your canvas, not the whole painting.
insights.segmentTimingTitle: When marriage themes may stir in time
insights.yogaTapDetail: Tap for meaning, why your chart shows it, and possible effects

narrativeSarpa.none: Your classical grahas spread more evenly around the wheel in this simple picture—there is no tight “serpent coil” clustering here. Seasons still visit you, but often from several directions rather than one repeating loop.
narrativeSarpa.partial: Several classical planets lean to one side of Rahu and Ketu’s axis—some traditions speak softly of a partial serpent pattern. Life may bring waves where lessons cluster, then release. Rituals that calm the heart, rest, and mentors you trust matter more than fear.
narrativeSarpa.full: Here, all seven classical planets gather on one side of the Rāhu–Ketu line in our simplified check—books sometimes associate this with intense karmic focus. Many lives with similar charts still move with courage. Slow decisions, loyal teachers, and honest self-care are your true allies.

narrativeAncestral.none: Sun and ninth-house themes feel relatively open—ancestors may visit more as quiet blessings than as unfinished homework.
narrativeAncestral.mild: A soft whisper toward remembrance appears—lighting a lamp, feeding someone hungry, or honouring elders in simple ways may settle something tender inside you.
narrativeAncestral.moderate: A few patterns invite you toward gratitude in the family line. That is not a verdict of fear—it often means your heart is being asked to widen. Gentle charity, truthfulness, and wise counsel usually help more than worry.

lifePath.open: Your chart suggests room to grow visibly: learning journeys, faith in tomorrow, and skills that make you proud at day’s end can be allies. Say yes to mentors who see your goodness.
lifePath.woven: Work, love, and duty may tug in realistic layers. You are not failing when life feels complex; you are weaving cloth that needs patience. Small honest steps beat perfect plans.
lifePath.deep: Some chapters ask you to walk with dignity through fog—Saturn-like stretches where rest, boundaries, and true friends carry you. Depth can become quiet strength when kindness includes you too.

insights.emptyBody: Generate your chart on the Kundli tab. This page reads your latest saved chart.
insights.disclaimer: Many traditions and books describe grahas, yogas, Kaalsarpa, and pitṛkārya differently. This screen encodes widely used *approximate* checks so you can learn patterns from your own chart offline. Results are indicative only.
insights.learnTitle: Learn: grahas, friends & foes, yogas, Kaalsarpa, pitṛ

edu.grahasBody: Each graha has karakatwa (significations): Sun for vitality and authority, Moon for mind and nurture, Mars for courage and heat, Mercury for speech and skill, Jupiter for wisdom and grace, Venus for harmony and pleasure, Saturn for patience and limits, Rahu–Ketu for obsession and release. House placement and dignity colour how these themes show up in life.
edu.mitraBody: Naisargika (natural) friendship is a fixed table between planets (e.g. Jupiter is friend to Sun, Moon, Mars). Mitra pairs tend to agree in effect; śatru pairs pull in different directions. Co-lordship, conjunction, and house strength modify this in real charts.
edu.yogaBody: A yoga is a meaningful combination of grahas, houses, or dignities (Gajakesari, Mahāpuruṣa yogas, etc.). Texts list hundreds; here we detect a small set that can be inferred reliably from longitude and whole-sign houses.
edu.kalasarBody: A common modern check: all seven classical planets lie on one side of the Rāhu–Ketu axis around the zodiac. Variants exist (partial, ascendant-based). We show a simple hemisphere test for learning.
edu.pitruBody: Remedial traditions link ancestors to the 9th house, the Sun, and Saturn. We flag *very rough* chart patterns (afflicted Sun, 9th lord in dusthāna) as conversation starters — not a verdict.

insights.sectionNaturalHint: Rows = from-graha; columns = to-graha. Rāhu/Ketu use a simplified rule.
insights.yogasNone: No named yoga from the small checklist matched — your chart can still hold many strengths.

yogaDescs.gajakesari: Jupiter occupies a kendra from the Moon — steadier judgement and support when other factors agree.
yogaDescs.budhaditya: Sun and Mercury share one sign — clarity of speech and learning potential.
yogaDescs.ruchaka: Mars in a kendra from lagna while strong (own/exalt sign) — courage and stamina when balanced.
yogaDescs.bhadra: Mercury in kendra from lagna while strong — skill and adaptability.
yogaDescs.hamsa: Jupiter in kendra from lagna while strong — guidance and growth themes.
yogaDescs.malavya: Venus in kendra from lagna while strong — harmony and arts.
yogaDescs.sasha: Saturn in kendra from lagna while strong — discipline and slow mastery.
yogaDescs.chandra_mangala: Moon and Mars together — emotional intensity and drive; channel through sport or craft.
yogaDescs.kemadruma: Moon without planets in adjacent signs (simplified check) — loneliness of mind unless cancelled by classics’ exceptions.

yogaDialog.impactHeading: What it can mean in life

gajakesari.what: Gajakesari connects Guru (Jupiter) with Chandra (Moon) when Jupiter occupies a kendra counted from the Moon.
gajakesari.impact: Traditions associate it with steadier judgement, supportive elders, and a calmer emotional compass when other factors agree.
gajakesari.whyThis: Here the Moon sits in house {{moonHouse}} from lagna and Jupiter in house {{jupHouse}}; the app uses whole-sign houses and a simplified kendra-from-Moon check.

budhaditya.what: Budhāditya is Sun and Mercury sharing one sign so speech and intelligence work together.
budhaditya.impact: Often linked with learning, articulation, and practical cleverness when Mercury is not heavily afflicted.
budhaditya.whyThis: Sun is in house {{sunHouse}} and Mercury in house {{merHouse}} from lagna; the yoga fires when both share the same sign in this engine.

ruchaka.what: Ruchaka is one of the Mahāpuruṣa yogas: strong Mars in a kendra from lagna.
ruchaka.impact: Classical texts tie it to courage, stamina, and leadership when anger is channelled constructively.
ruchaka.whyThis: Mars occupies house {{marsHouse}} from lagna with own-sign or exaltation dignity in the current checklist.

bhadra.what: Bhadra is strong Mercury in a kendra from lagna.
bhadra.impact: Associated with skill, adaptability, and clear communication in favourable charts.
bhadra.whyThis: Mercury is in house {{merHouse}} from lagna with own-sign or exaltation in this simplified test.

hamsa.what: Hamsa is strong Jupiter in a kendra from lagna.
hamsa.impact: Linked to guidance, ethics, and growth-oriented opportunities.
hamsa.whyThis: Jupiter is in house {{jupHouse}} from lagna with own-sign or exaltation in this checklist.

malavya.what: Malavya is strong Venus in a kendra from lagna.
malavya.impact: Often read as harmony, aesthetics, and relational grace when balanced.
malavya.whyThis: Venus is in house {{venHouse}} from lagna with own-sign or exaltation in this engine.

sasha.what: Śaśa is strong Saturn in a kendra from lagna.
sasha.impact: Tied to discipline, slow mastery, and responsibility when hardship is met with patience.
sasha.whyThis: Saturn is in house {{satHouse}} from lagna with own-sign or exaltation in this simplified rule.

chandra_mangala.what: Chandra–Maṅgala joins Moon and Mars in the same sign.
chandra_mangala.impact: Can heighten drive and emotional heat—sport, craft, and honest movement help balance it.
chandra_mangala.whyThis: Moon is in house {{moonHouse}} and Mars in house {{marsHouse}}; the yoga triggers when both share one sign.

kemadruma.what: Kemadruma (simplified) appears when the Moon has no classical planet in the signs immediately before and after.
kemadruma.impact: Texts describe a lonely or restless mind unless strong cancellations exist.
kemadruma.whyThis: Moon is in house {{moonHouse}} from lagna and adjacent signs are empty of tara grahas in this rough scan.

kaalsarp.none: No simple hemisphere clustering of all seven grahas on one side of the Rāhu–Ketu axis.
kaalsarp.partial: Several grahas cluster on one side of the axis — some texts call this partial; traditions disagree.
kaalsarp.full: All seven classical grahas fall on one open semicircle between Rāhu and Ketu in this simplified test — study calmly with a teacher; many charts still thrive.

pitru.none: No strong pitṛ-style flag from the simple checklist.
pitru.mild: One soft pattern (e.g. Sun with Saturn or 9th lord weak) — optional remembrance and ethical living matter more than fear.
pitru.moderate: Multiple simple afflictions to Sun/9th themes — use as a prompt for gratitude and dharma, not anxiety.

pitruReasons.sun_with_rahu: Sun and Rahu share a sign (eclipse symbolism — mixed visibility).
pitruReasons.sun_with_saturn: Sun and Saturn share a sign (duty vs vitality tension).
pitruReasons.ninth_lord_dusthana: Lord of the 9th occupies 6th, 8th, or 12th house.

marriage.uplift: Venus/Jupiter or 7th lord mostly in supportive houses — nurture friendship inside marriage and keep honest dialogue.
marriage.mixed: Mixed signals for Venus and 7th house — success grows through patience, boundaries, and shared routines.
marriage.care: Challenging placements for Venus or 7th lord — go slow with commitments; counselling and clarity help more than superstition.

career.uplift: Sun/Mercury/Jupiter favour 10th or kendras — build visible skill and steady reputation.
career.mixed: Career path may shift; diversify skills and avoid burning bridges on impulse.
career.care: 10th themes under stress — prefer stable roles, document agreements, and invest in one craft deeply.

family.uplift: Moon/Jupiter support family houses — gatherings and elders can be nourishing now.
family.mixed: Family life has both warmth and friction — small rituals and listening prevent drift.
family.care: Moon or 4th under strain — protect rest, simplify obligations, and seek mediation if needed.

health.uplift: Moon and benefics relatively clear — steady sleep and meals keep you resilient.
health.mixed: Energy swings possible — alternate effort with recovery; watch inflammation and stress.
health.care: Malefics emphasise 6/8/12 — regular check-ups, gentle exercise, and calm pacing matter.

insights.marriageTimingTitle: When marriage may come into focus (Vimśottari hint)
insights.marriageTimingBody: The next mahādasha led by {{planet}} between ages {{from}} and {{to}} years is one window texts often watch for Venus/Jupiter/7th-lord themes — not a guarantee.
insights.marriageTimingNone: No matching mahādasha segment before age 100 in this scan — try adjusting birth time accuracy.
insights.marriageTimingHint: Exact marriage age needs divisional charts, transits, and cultural context; use this only as a study anchor.

tone.uplift: Overall themes lean supportive — this is a good season to build on what is working and share good news with people you trust.
tone.mixed: Life is in a mixed phase — some areas ask patience while others open doors. Focus on one clear priority at a time.
tone.care: A heavier chapter may be active — move slowly, protect rest, and lean on mentors. Remedies and honest routines help more than haste.

currentScenario.dashaLine: Vimshottari now: {{maha}} mahādasha, {{bhukti}} bhukti — this colours mood, opportunities, and delays.

dashaWeight.supportive: The running dasha lords are generally considered gentle — favour learning, relationships, and steady work.
dashaWeight.mixed: The running dasha mix is neutral — outcomes depend on your choices and daily discipline.
dashaWeight.heavy: Saturn/Rahu/Mars-type periods ask extra care — avoid rash vows; pooja and patience are traditional allies.

insights.doshaTabIntro: From your saved Kundli only — each block shows whether this dosha is present and what it may mean in life. Confirm with a pandit before remedies.
insights.doshaAllClearTitle: No major dosha in this scan
insights.doshaAllClearBody: Kaal Sarp, Sarpa, Pitṛ, and Guru Chaṇḍāla patterns from our checklist did not light up. You may still do general śānti for peace — see Remedies tab.

doshaKaalsarp.title: Kaal Sarp (Kālasarpa) dosha
doshaKaalsarp.clear: All seven classical grahas are not trapped on one side of the Rahu–Ketu axis in this check — Kaal Sarp dosha is not indicated.

implication.partial: Some grahas lean to one side of Rahu–Ketu — partial Kaal Sarp is suggested. Life may bring clustered lessons then relief. Avoid fear; slow decisions and honest routines help.
implication.full: All seven classical grahas sit on one side of Rahu–Ketu — full Kaal Sarp is indicated. Traditions link this to intense karmic focus, delays, and sudden turns. Remedies at Gokarna and Guru guidance are often sought.

doshaSarpa.title: Sarpa dosha (Rahu/Ketu in 6–7–8)
doshaSarpa.clear: Rahu and Ketu are not in the 6th, 7th, or 8th from Lagna, Sun, or Moon in this rule — Sarpa dosha is not indicated.
doshaSarpa.implication: Rahu or Ketu sits in a sensitive house (6/7/8) from Lagna, Sun, or Moon. This can bring hidden fears, relationship tests, or health swings. Rahu–Ketu śānti at Gokarna is traditionally done.

doshaPitru.title: Pitṛ dosha (ancestral)
doshaPitru.clear: Sun and 9th-house themes look relatively open — strong Pitṛ dosha is not indicated in this scan.

implication.mild: A mild Pitṛ hint — simple remembrance of elders, charity, or Tripindi-style rituals may bring peace of mind.
implication.moderate: Clearer Pitṛ pattern — ancestors may need gratitude through śrāddha, dāna, or pitṛkārya. This is a call to widen the heart, not a curse.

doshaGuruChandal.title: Guru Chaṇḍāla dosha
doshaGuruChandal.clear: Jupiter does not share a sign with Rahu or Ketu — Guru Chaṇḍāla is not indicated.
doshaGuruChandal.implication: Jupiter sits with Rahu or Ketu — wisdom may clash with illusion or sudden turns. Guru vandana, truthfulness, and Vishnu/Guru remedies are traditional supports.

insights.kaalsarpHowTo: Full Kālasarpa means all seven classical grahas sit on one side of the Rāhu–Ketu axis. Twelve names (Anant to Sheshnag) depend on Rahu’s house from lagna. Verify with a qualified jyotiṣī before booking pooja.
insights.sarpaDoshaActive: Rahu or Ketu occupies the 6th, 7th, or 8th house from lagna, Sun, or Moon — traditions link this to sarpa/special Rahu–Ketu remedies.
insights.sarpaDoshaNone: No sarpa-dosha pattern from this rule in your chart.
insights.guruChandalYes: Jupiter shares a sign with Rahu or Ketu — some texts suggest Guru/Vishnu-centric remedies and ethical living.
insights.guruChandalNo: No Guru Chaṇḍāla conjunction in this chart.
insights.doshaConsultNote: Always confirm doshas with a Tamrapatra-certified pandit or trusted jyotiṣī before booking travel or pooja.
insights.seventhLordBody: Your 7th lord is {{lord}} — marriage tone follows this graha’s house, dignity, and dasha periods.
insights.familyDashaNoteBody: Home and elders are coloured by {{maha}} mahādasha and {{bhukti}} bhukti — gentleness at home multiplies blessings.
insights.longevityRange: Rough indicative range: {{low}} – {{high}} years (midpoint about {{mid}}). Not a medical prediction.
insights.longevityDisclaimer: Classical texts use 8th-house strength, Saturn, and Moon for broad life-phase hints only. This is educational — consult doctors for health and a jyotiṣī for personal readings.

longevityFactors.eighthLordStrong: 8th lord in a supportive house adds stability to life-phase estimates.
longevityFactors.eighthLordDusthana: 8th lord in a dusthāna house suggests more transformative life chapters.
longevityFactors.moonKendra: Moon in kendra supports emotional steadiness.
longevityFactors.saturnEighth: Saturn in the 8th house — traditions emphasise discipline and care.
longevityFactors.marsEighth: Mars in the 8th house — watch heat, accidents, and impulsive risk.

insights.poojaContactBody: For Kaal Sarp, Rahu–Ketu, Pitṛ, and related remedies, call our recommended contact:
insights.poojaContactHint: Mention your name, birth details, and which dosha the app flagged. Verify chart with pandit before payment.
insights.poojaNoneTitle: No major dosha flag from our checklist
insights.poojaNoneBody: General śānti or yearly pooja may still be done for peace of mind — call if you want guidance.
insights.poojaVerifyNote: All recommended poojas are performed in Gokarna, Uttara Kannada, Karnataka (Mahabaleshwar / Kotitheertha area). Prices are indicative (₹300–₹5,000). Call 9972339362.
insights.remediesContactBody: All Kaal Sarp, Rahu–Ketu, Pitṛ, and related poojas are arranged in Gokarna, Uttara Kannada, Karnataka. Call for personal reading and remedy guidance:
insights.remediesContactHint: Share your name, birth details, and which dosha the app flagged. Our pandit in Gokarna will confirm your chart before any payment.

items.kaalSarpaTrimbakeshwarDesc: Homa and mantra to Lord Shiva, Rahu, and Ketu — performed in Gokarna with experienced pandits.
items.kaalSarpaTrimbakeshwarLoc: Mahabaleshwar Temple area, Gokarna, Uttara Kannada, Karnataka
items.rahuKetuKalahastiDesc: Special Rahu–Ketu śānti for nodal doshas — done at sacred teertha in Gokarna.
items.rahuKetuKalahastiLoc: Kotitheertha / Rahu–Ketu kṣetra, Gokarna, Uttara Kannada, Karnataka
items.rahuKetuShantiDesc: Mantra, dāna, and śānti for partial serpent-axis or sarpa patterns.
items.rahuKetuShantiCost: Varies; discuss with pandit on call
items.tripindiShradhDesc: Ancestral ritual for pitṛ peace when Sun/9th house themes are afflicted.
items.tripindiShradhLoc: Gokarna pitṛ kṣetra, Uttara Kannada, Karnataka
items.narayanNagbaliDesc: Combined ritual for pitṛ and sarpa karmas in some traditions.
items.guruChandalRemedyDesc: Guru vandana, Vishnu sahasranāma, or yellow dāna when Jupiter meets Rahu/Ketu.
items.guruChandalRemedyLoc: Gokarna temple or home pooja with local pandit guidance

reading.intro: From your generated Kundli: Lagna (1st house) is in {{rashi}}. All houses are counted clockwise from this point.
reading.lagnaLine: Lagna is {{rashi}}. Lagna lord {{lord}} sits in the {{lordHouse}}th house {{relation}}. Planets with Lagna: {{withPlanets}}.
reading.ageLine: From your Kundli chart age: about {{age}} years now.

phase.supportive: Current phase is {{tone}}: {{maha}} mahadasha and {{bhukti}} bhukti favour steady progress.
phase.mixed: Current phase is {{tone}}: {{maha}} / {{bhukti}} dasha — balance effort with rest.
phase.heavy: Current phase is {{tone}}: {{maha}} / {{bhukti}} period — move slowly; remedies and patience help.

marriage.strong: From your Kundli: 7th lord {{seventhLord}} and Venus in {{venusInChart}} support partnership when you communicate clearly.
marriage.mixed: From your Kundli: marriage themes are mixed — 7th lord {{seventhLord}}, Venus in {{venusInChart}}; patience and honesty matter.
marriage.care: From your Kundli: 7th lord {{seventhLord}} and Venus in {{venusInChart}} ask for slow commitments and family counsel.

family.strong: From your Kundli: 4th lord {{fourthLord}} and Moon in house {{moonHouse}} support home peace and elders.
family.mixed: From your Kundli: family life needs listening — 4th lord {{fourthLord}}, Moon in house {{moonHouse}}.

career.strong: From your Kundli: 10th lord {{tenthLord}} in house {{tenthLordHouse}} supports visible work and reputation.
career.mixed: From your Kundli: career path may shift — 10th lord {{tenthLord}} in house {{tenthLordHouse}}; build skills steadily.
career.care: From your Kundli: 10th lord {{tenthLord}} in house {{tenthLordHouse}} prefers stable roles and documented agreements.

reading.careerJobs: Work areas suited from your chart: {{jobs}}.
reading.careerJobsNone: No strong career karaka flag — diversify skills from your 10th house lord placement.

health.strong: From your Kundli: Moon in house {{moonHouse}} supports routine and recovery when you protect sleep.
health.mixed: From your Kundli: Moon in house {{moonHouse}} — alternate work with rest.
health.care: From your Kundli: Moon in house {{moonHouse}} — regular check-ups and calm pacing matter.

caution.dusthana: {{planet}} in {{house}}th house (dusthana) — avoid rash decisions in this area.
caution.kaalsarp: Kālasarpa pattern in your Kundli — Kaal Sarp / Rahu–Ketu śānti may be discussed with pandit.
caution.sarpa: Sarpa dosha hint in your Kundli — Rahu–Ketu care is traditional.
caution.pitru: Pitṛ themes in your Kundli — ancestral gratitude helps.
caution.guruChandal: Guru Chaṇḍāla hint — Guru worship supports balance.

strength.strong: {{planet}} in {{houseLabel}} is strong ({{relation}}) — helpful in this area.
strength.lagnaLord: Lagna lord {{lord}} in {{houseLabel}} supports your personality.

reading.houseGood: {{house}}th house ({{rashi}}): lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouse}}th; grahas: {{occupants}} — supportive area.
reading.houseWatch: {{house}}th house ({{rashi}}): lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouse}}th — needs steady effort; avoid rushing big decisions here.
reading.housesGuideIntro: In the South Indian chart, rāśi signs are fixed in the grid; bhāvas are counted clockwise from your Lagna (1st house). Each score (0–100) comes from your house lord's placement, friendly/enemy sign, and grahas sitting in that bhāva.
reading.houseBodyLabel: Body areas linked to this bhāva
reading.dashaCautionTitle: Ages to move carefully (Vimśottari dasha / bhukti)

houseSections.h1: Who you are — body, mind, confidence, and life direction
houseSections.h2: Money, family, speech, food, and childhood support
houseSections.h3: Courage, siblings, short travel, skills, and effort
houseSections.h4: Mother, home, land, vehicles, peace, and schooling
houseSections.h5: Children, love, creativity, intelligence, and merit
houseSections.h6: Enemies, debts, illness, daily work, and service
houseSections.h7: Spouse, marriage, business partners, and public deals
houseSections.h8: Life span, sudden events, inheritance, and transformation
houseSections.h9: Father, guru, luck, dharma, and long journeys
houseSections.h10: Job, reputation, government, and visible success
houseSections.h11: Profit, fulfilled dreams, friends, and elder siblings
houseSections.h12: Expenses, foreign lands, sleep, charity, and liberation

houseThemes.h1: identity, physical body, confidence, vitality, and the overall direction of life
houseThemes.h2: money, savings, family of birth, speech, food habits, and early upbringing
houseThemes.h3: courage, younger siblings, short travel, writing, hobbies, and hands-on skills
houseThemes.h4: mother, home peace, land, vehicles, emotional comfort, and early schooling
houseThemes.h5: children, creativity, romance, speculation, mantras, and past-life merit (puṇya)
houseThemes.h6: enemies, debts, daily work, illness, service, and pets
houseThemes.h7: marriage, spouse, business partners, public dealings, and legal contracts
houseThemes.h8: longevity, sudden events, inheritance, occult study, and deep transformation
houseThemes.h9: father, guru, dharma, higher education, luck, and long journeys
houseThemes.h10: career, reputation, government, bosses, and visible karma in society
houseThemes.h11: profits, fulfilled wishes, elder siblings, networks, and social gains
houseThemes.h12: expenses, foreign lands, sleep, isolation, charity, and spiritual liberation

houseBody.h2: face, right eye, teeth, tongue, mouth, throat
houseBody.h3: shoulders, arms, hands, right ear, upper chest
houseBody.h7: kidneys, lower back, urinary tract, reproductive organs
houseBody.h8: chronic illness zones, excretory system, external sexual organs

lordContext.ownSign: The lord sits in its own sign — a clear strength for this life area.
lordContext.kendra: The lord sits in a kendra (angular house) — results show openly in the world.
lordContext.trikona: The lord sits in a trikona — dharmic support and natural grace.
lordContext.upachaya: The lord sits in an upachaya house — results grow with age and effort.
lordContext.dusthana: The lord sits in a dusthāna (6/8/12) — this area needs patience, remedies, and realistic expectations.
lordContext.general: The lord's house colours how easily this bhāva gives results.

overviewLong.intro: Your chart uses whole-sign houses from {{rashi}} Lagna: the Lagna sign is always the 1st house, and each next sign clockwise is the next house.
overviewLong.lagna: Lagna is in {{rashi}}. Lagna lord {{lord}} sits in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{relation}}. Planets with Lagna: {{withPlanets}}.
overviewLong.age: You are about {{age}} years old now.
overviewLong.dasha: Vimshottari dasha now: {{maha}} mahādasha and {{bhukti}} bhukti. {{phaseHint}}
overviewLong.dashaNoAge: Vimshottari dasha now: {{maha}} mahādasha and {{bhukti}} bhukti. {{phaseHint}}
overviewLong.phaseSupportive: This period generally supports steady work, learning and relationships if you keep a calm pace.
overviewLong.phaseMixed: This period is mixed — balance effort with rest; avoid forcing big decisions when tired.
overviewLong.phaseHeavy: This period asks patience — remedies, routine and avoiding risky leaps help more than rushing.

houseLong.noGraha: No classical graha sits in this bhāva, so the house lord shapes the story here.
houseLong.grahaPresent: Grahas placed here: {{grahas}}. Their qualities colour this part of life.
houseLong.lord: The bhāva lord {{lord}} is sitting in {{lordHouseLabel}}, {{lordRelation}}. {{lordContext}}

intro.h1: Your 1st bhāva paints who you are — your body, your personality, your overall direction in life.
intro.h2: Your 2nd bhāva is about money you keep, your immediate family, your speech and your food habits.
intro.h3: Your 3rd bhāva shows courage, siblings, short trips, hobbies and the everyday skills your hands learn.
intro.h4: Your 4th bhāva is the mother, the home, peace of mind, the land and vehicles you live around.
intro.h5: Your 5th bhāva carries children, romance, your intelligence and the merit you bring from past lives.
intro.h6: Your 6th bhāva covers competitors, daily work, debts and any health niggles you have to manage.
intro.h7: Your 7th bhāva is about marriage, your life partner and any partnerships or contracts you sign.
intro.h8: Your 8th bhāva looks at lifespan, sudden changes, inheritances and matters kept private.
intro.h9: Your 9th bhāva is the father, teachers, long journeys, higher learning and how lucky life feels.
intro.h10: Your 10th bhāva is career, the work the world sees, your reputation and the respect you earn.
intro.h11: Your 11th bhāva is income, gains, the friend circle around you and the wishes you want to come true.
intro.h12: Your 12th bhāva is expenses, foreign lands, retreat, charity and your inner spiritual life.

tier.excellent: {{intro}} In this chart the bhāva is in {{rashi}} sign and scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}} of 5 stars) — a clearly strong area. {{lordSentence}} {{grahaSentence}} You can lean on this side of life with confidence.
tier.good: {{intro}} In your chart it is in {{rashi}} sign with a score of {{score}}/100 ({{stars}}/5) — a generally supportive area. {{lordSentence}} {{grahaSentence}} Stay consistent and the results here grow steadily.
tier.average: {{intro}} In your chart it falls in {{rashi}} sign and scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}}/5) — mixed signals. {{lordSentence}} {{grahaSentence}} Your own effort and the running dasha decide most of what you get here.
tier.weak: {{intro}} In your chart it is in {{rashi}} sign and scores only {{score}}/100 ({{stars}}/5) — this area needs care. {{lordSentence}} {{grahaSentence}} Avoid hasty moves; small steady habits help much more than big risks.
tier.challenging: {{intro}} In your chart it is in {{rashi}} sign with a low score of {{score}}/100 ({{stars}}/5) — a pressured zone. {{lordSentence}} {{grahaSentence}} Patience, honest routines and a few traditional remedies will serve you better than fighting it.

housePredictionComposed.noGraha: No graha sits in this bhāva — results come mainly from the house lord.
housePredictionComposed.excellent: {{houseOpen}} Bhāva {{house}} ({{rashi}} sign) scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}} stars). Themes: {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}}. {{grahas}} This is a strong zone — you can lean on it.
housePredictionComposed.good: {{houseOpen}} Bhāva {{house}} ({{rashi}}) scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}} stars). Themes: {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}}. {{grahas}} Steady effort here brings reliable results.
housePredictionComposed.average: {{houseOpen}} Bhāva {{house}} ({{rashi}}) scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}} stars). Themes: {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}}. {{grahas}} Mixed results — your choices and dasha timing matter most.
housePredictionComposed.weak: {{houseOpen}} Bhāva {{house}} ({{rashi}}) scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}} stars). Themes: {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}}. {{grahas}} Go slow here; small daily habits help more than big gambles.
housePredictionComposed.challenging: {{houseOpen}} Bhāva {{house}} ({{rashi}}) scores {{score}}/100 ({{stars}} stars). Themes: {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}}. {{grahas}} This area needs patience, remedies, and realistic expectations.

housePrediction.noGraha: No classical graha occupies this bhāva — the house lord alone decides the story.
housePrediction.excellent: Your {{houseName}} is strong (score {{score}}/100, {{stars}} stars). It falls in {{rashi}}, a {{element}} sign, ruling {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} sits in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}} — {{lordContext}} {{occupants}} You can lean on this area for growth and confidence.
housePrediction.good: Your {{houseName}} is generally supportive (score {{score}}/100, {{stars}} stars). {{rashi}} ({{element}} sign) governs {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}} — {{lordContext}} {{occupants}} Stay consistent here and results improve steadily.
housePrediction.average: Your {{houseName}} is mixed (score {{score}}/100, {{stars}} stars). {{rashi}} sign covers {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}} — {{lordContext}} {{occupants}} Neither fully blocked nor fully free — your choices and dasha timing matter most.
housePrediction.weak: Your {{houseName}} needs attention (score {{score}}/100, {{stars}} stars). In {{rashi}} ({{element}}), this bhāva rules {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}} — {{lordContext}} {{occupants}} Avoid hasty decisions here; small daily discipline helps more than big gambles.
housePrediction.challenging: Your {{houseName}} is under pressure (score {{score}}/100, {{stars}} stars). {{rashi}} sign links to {{themes}}. Lord {{lord}} in {{lordHouseLabel}} {{lordRelation}} — {{lordContext}} {{occupants}} Traditional remedies, honest routines, and consulting a jyotiṣī are wise for this bhāva.

reason.heavyMaha: {{maha}} mahādāśa often slows plans and tests patience — do not force major risks.
reason.heavyBhukti: Within the running mahādāśa, {{bhukti}} bhukti adds friction — read contracts twice and protect health.
reason.heavyStack: {{maha}} mahādāśa with {{bhukti}} bhukti together is a heavy stretch — postpone risky travel and big loans if you can.
reason.dusthanaMaha: {{maha}} mahādāśa rules a dusthāna in your chart — health, debts, or hidden matters need extra care.
reason.dusthanaBoth: {{maha}} mahādāśa and {{bhukti}} bhukti both touch difficult houses — this is a key age band for caution and remedies.

danger.fire: fire, heat, kitchen safety, and electrical burns
danger.delays: delays, legal blocks, and depression spells
danger.poison: food poisoning, toxins, and allergy flare-ups
danger.sudden: sudden shocks, theft, or unexpected losses
danger.snake: snake fear, insect bites, and phobias (traditional Rahu karakatva)
danger.cuts: cuts, minor surgeries, and skin issues
danger.isolation: loneliness, hospital stays, or remote travel alone
danger.water: water accidents, drowning fear, and chest congestion
danger.travel: night travel and long journeys without rest
danger.heart: heart, eyes, and ego clashes with authority
danger.authority: clashes with bosses or government offices

reading.doshaClear: From your Kundli: no major dosha flag in our checklist.
reading.longevity: From your Kundli (indicative only): life span band about {{low}}–{{high}} years (mid ~{{mid}}). Not medical advice.

jobs.jupiter: Jupiter-strong — law, advisory, education, dharma work
jobs.venus: Venus-strong — arts, design, hospitality, luxury trade
jobs.tenthLord: 10th lord {{lord}} in {{house}}th house — vocation follows this graha's karakatva

melapak.title: Melapak (match)
melapak.subtitle: Birth Moon of the girl and boy — Ashta Kuta (up to 36) with Rajju and Vedha checks. Many families use 18/36 as a rough minimum; 24+ is often read as strong.
melapak.disclaimer: This is a simplified reference calculator. Real matching also considers Kuja/Māṅgala dosha, dasa balance, caste/regional rules, and family counsel.
melapak.required: Choose date and time for both.
melapak.cutoffHint: Common cut-off: about 18/36 points; Rajju or Vedha dosha is often treated separately even when the point total is high.
melapak.rajjuWarn: Rajju dosha: same body-line grouping in the Saravali-style table — many almanacs advise caution.
melapak.vedhaWarn: Vedha dosha: nakṣatras form a harmful pair in the common 12-pair list.

verdict.0: Low match by this model — review calmly with elders or an astrologer.
verdict.1: Moderate — crosses a common 18-point floor if doshas are absent.
verdict.2: Good — solid Ashta Kuta total with no Rajju/Vedha flags here.
verdict.3: Strong — high score and no Rajju/Vedha in this scan.

consent.title: Privacy first
consent.message: Your birth details and Kundli stay on this device. If you accept, we only store anonymous usage counts locally to improve the app. No ad trackers.

install.title: Install app
install.message: Install Baggona Panchanga Astrology for daily Panchang and gentle reminders.

location.pinNotFound: Could not resolve this PIN — check the code or pick place manually
